CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-22-2019 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2019 Continued To May-08-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-25-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT DISTRICT's DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Defendant San Francisco Bay Area Rapid Transit District's demurrer to plaintiff's amended complaint is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-24-2019 Continued To Feb-25-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Juanita Irving, 510-938-8360 Plaintiff in Pro Per.
Donald Eichhorn, 415-433-0990 for Defendant SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT DISTRICT through Court Call.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. The Court shares the basis for the tentative ruling and states there was no opposition filed. Plaintiff requests to continue the matter to retain new counsel. Defendant opposes request. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT DISTRICT DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Continued to 2/25/19 at 9:30 am for Plaintiff to retain new Counsel. Opposition is due on 2/8/19. Counsel for Defendant to serve a copy of the Demurrer and all supporting papers by overnight mail to the address given by Plaintiff in Open Court. If there is no timely Opposition filed, the Court will adopt the tentative ruling and dismiss the case with Prejudice. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
